text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Inari One has been recuperating in
the dorms for a while...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So where we headin'? The sun's on its way down,
ya know.
choice_data_list: I don't want to spoil the surprise.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Geez, there's a surprise? Eh, whatever you say.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't even be here, not when we're so strapped for
time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With an emotionally fatigued Inari One in tow, we
head toward our destination.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Exactly what're you thinkin'? This bus goes
straight to my old neighborhood!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Exactly what're you thinkin'? This bus goes
straight to my old neighborhood!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: This supposed to be your surprise?!
choice_data_list: I want you to trust me, as your partner.
I want you to trust me, as your partner.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I will. I'm more than in your debt, Boss. So I
can entertain somethin' like this.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I will. I'm more than in your debt, Boss. So I
can entertain somethin' like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we arrive just before the sun has
completely set.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What's... all this here?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's obvious! I'm askin' why there's a festival
this time of the year.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wait. What does that say?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This festival is to wish health and prosperity to
Inari One, the famous Umamusume raised on
these streets. ...Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: H-hey! The heck's goin' on?!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Well, well. You're a lot more lively than I'd heard.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, Chief.

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Inariii! You've been working so hard! The whole
team'll be here today, so let's cut loose and have
some fun!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Inari! We're all here, the young'uns and us
old folk! Let's make some real noise, whaddaya
say?!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Once we heard you were comin', us ladies all got
so excited!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Aww, you guys... But why?
choice_data_list: The whole town did this for you.
The whole town did this for you.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer. Don't exclude yourself now.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who came lookin' for advice,
askin' anybody and everyone for help to get this
whole thing organized!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss...
choice_data_list: Ch-Chief! You promised not to say anything!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss...
choice_data_list: Ch-Chief! You promised not to say anything!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Jus' stop it already.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Everyone, stop this!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I promised you all I'd reach the top and become
Umamusume of the Year! I practically shouted it
from the rooftops, but...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But... what have I even got done?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I let you all down. I flat out dropped the ball
'cause I couldn't shoulder the weight.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: A lame-ass disappointment like me...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Doesn't deserve any of this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A brief silence follows Inari One's outburst. But
not a single person, me included, chooses to
leave her side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, finally...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
For workin' yourself to the bone, for keepin' us in
your thoughts...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Seein' ya work so hard, I can't help but smile... I'm
proud of ya, kiddo.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But why?

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
When I saw ya take on those central races—the
spring Tenno Sho, the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
I was over the moon. I couldn't believe a runner as
cool as you was representin' us!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
It was a real thrill seein' ya compete in the big
races. I saw ya runnin' proud, from your race in
the Mainichi Okan to the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Ya nearly made this old man cry, goin' toe-to-toe
with your generation's best! Wahaha!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
You were so small once, and now there's hundreds
of people out there, callin' your name...

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
When I saw that, I burst into tears! I think I cried
more than at my daughter's weddin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Inari... You called yourself a "lame-ass
disappointment," didn't ya?

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: But no one here thinks of you that way.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Ya ran for us and gave us more than we can even
wrap our arms around. If anything...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: We couldn't ask for a more classy representative.

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Seein' ya run in those central races brings us true
joy, ya hear?

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm so thankful to have reached this
age 'cause I was able to see ya run!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Ya see? To us, you've always been the great Inari!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
So come on, would ya? Go on and take all that
weight off your shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: All ya need to do... is put up a fight.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Urk... Guh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Nnngh! Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One bursts into tears under the sparkling
lights of the festival as the people of Oi stand
around her in respectful silence.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Chief... everyone... Boss...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Chief... everyone... Boss...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm so thankful. Now that ya helped me get those tears outta my system, I feel free as a bird!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, it's time to switch things up! How can I
mope around when there's a celebration goin'
down? ...Let's party!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: I'm way ahead of ya on that one, ya little fox!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wahoo! Wahoo!

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text: Wahoo! Wahoo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Ya know, makin' a ruckus with everyone really
takes me back.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I still remember the festivals I saw as a kid. The
air was so electric—so full of tension—yet the Oi
folks still pulled off one helluva festival.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I asked them how they managed it with so much
style.)

text_block_list.name: Townsperson
text_block_list.text:
"I can't fail," "I won't lose," "I gotta do this..."
Sure, those kinda thoughts make ya tense, but
those tense moments are vital to any festival.

text_block_list.name: Townsperson
text_block_list.text: And after a while, ya realize that tension is what's drivin' your spirit. It gets your blood boilin'—makes ya wanna work hard and play harder!

text_block_list.name: Townsperson
text_block_list.text:
And the rush ya get when ya pull it off! It feels
like I'm a firework jettin' off into the sky, bursting
with everyone's emotions!

text_block_list.name: Townsperson
text_block_list.text:
That passion is what gives our downtown festival
that style—a soul all its own!

text_block_list.name: Young Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Still not sure how ya did it, but everything you're sayin' is so classy!

text_block_list.name: Townsperson
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you'll understand soon enough, Inari. Ya just
need a big festival to kick things off!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I didn't get it at the time, but now it's all startin'
to make sense.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (The passionate soul of a festival... that's what gives a festival style. Yeah... that's what I've been missin'!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we watch the last of the celebrations
from the shrine. It'll be a memory we won't soon
forget.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You know, I finally realized what I've been missin'
all this time.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I was so worried 'bout what everyone back home
would think, that I started fixatin' on results.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I lost sight of my soul—the passion at the heart of
my fight. I even lost sight of myself.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I still wanna live up to everyone's
expectations. But there was somethin' before
that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That first spark... What got me goin' in the first
place was provin' the regionals are just as good as
the centrals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You can't put on a festival alone. But... the festival still has to start with me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah, this fight—this festival I'm plannin' is mine! I'm the one who's gonna stand at the top!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen's comin' up—probably the
biggest festival in the whole Twinkle Series. And
I'm gonna make it mine.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I've got everyone's hopes with me, right here in
my heart. And they're gonna help me settle things
once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Blastin' my way past the finish line and up into the
sky, I'll take the top of the Twinkle Series—the
brightest firework of 'em all, shinin' loud and
proud!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So, Boss...
choice_data_list: I'll be with you, every step.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So, Boss...
choice_data_list: I'll be with you, every step.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
choice_data_list: Because you can't put on a festival on your own!
Because you can't put on a festival on your own!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, you're not wrong there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...I'll be countin' on ya, partner. Let's make the
Arima Kinen our best festival yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of us continue our journey with
our eyes set on the final, and greatest, festival of
the year!
